title: Extra Armor
description: Have you found that there's not enough armor in the game? Well look no further. This mod adds the possibility to make most blocks in game to armor.
body:
Here is the first version!! I will update this mod (same version) with more armor. As of right now this mods makes it so you can make more vanilla blocks into armor (no weapons or tools) but in the future I will make some custom ores for new armors. 

Better the item used to craft armor the better the armor.
